name: Japanese Lamb for Crockpot
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in the crockpot.
2. Cook on LOW for several hours until the lamb is tender and infused with the flavors of the sauce, honey, vinegar, sherry, garlic, ginger, and optional chicken stock.
3. Once cooked, strain the liquid and discard solids if desired.
4. Serve with green beans sautéed in a little oil and yellow rice.
